query:
-- Find instalaciones that are Programado but linked anuncio is Activo
SELECT 
  i.id as instalacion_id,
  i.estado as inst_estado,
  a.id as anuncio_id,
  a.estado as anuncio_estado,
  a.producto,
  a.cliente,
  p.cobertizo_id,
  p.flow_cat,
  p.orientacion
FROM instalaciones i
JOIN anuncios a ON i.anuncio_id = a.id
JOIN paradas p ON i.parada_id = p.id
WHERE i.estado = 'Programado' AND a.estado = 'Activo'
ORDER BY a.cliente, p.cobertizo_id;
